<!-- generated: 2026-05-30 / uoink v3.2 -->
# Uoink full site context

## URL: https://uoink.app/
Uoink turns videos and podcasts into private local corpora for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and MCP-capable agents. The core loop is click, corpus, AI. The corpus includes transcript, screenshots, comments, channel context, metadata, and citations.

## URL: https://uoink.app/install
Install the desktop helper, install the browser extension, then click the Uoink button. The Windows helper runs from %LOCALAPPDATA%\Uoink and exposes localhost 127.0.0.1:5179. Browser extension support targets Chromium browsers. Chrome Web Store approval is pending, so the release zip is the launch path. macOS is on the v2.3 track.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features
The feature index groups Uoink into Capture, AI handoff, Library, Analysis, Local and private, and Dashboard. Dashboard and agents can fetch https://uoink.app/api/features-manifest for slug, name, URL, embed URL, status, category, summary, and MCP tools.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/youtube-video-capture
Feature detail page. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/youtube-video-capture?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/youtube-shorts
Feature detail page. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/youtube-shorts?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/agents
Agent setup explains the local Model Context Protocol server, stdio transport, placeholder config snippets, and 13 tools: uoink_video, uoink_playlist, get_job_status, cancel_job, list_recent_uoinks, search_uoinks, get_uoink_corpus, analyze_comments, classify_hook, get_taxonomy, get_citation_map, get_uoink_health, find_mentions.

## URL: https://uoink.app/mcp
Machine-readable MCP discovery surface with manifest JSON at https://uoink.app/mcp/manifest.json.

## URL: https://uoink.app/privacy
Privacy policy: no Uoink cloud, no account, no telemetry, optional Anthropic calls use the user's own key.

## URL: https://uoink.app/about
About page explains the open-source posture and shows one public GitHub release download total. Counts come from GitHub's public Releases API. Uoink tracks no download identities.
